market_pulse: Memorial Day Weekend momentum building across Vegas nightlife with heavy DJ rotation — Calvin Harris, David Guetta, Tiësto, John Summit, DJ Drama, and R.L. Grime all confirmed this weekend.

content_gaps.description: Strong countdown/hype posts about MDW weekend events across XS, Encore, OMNIA, Zouk, Hakkasan — LIV has event lineups but limited visual hype countdown content
content_gaps.suggested_action: Deploy Stories countdown to MDW weekend with 48-hour, 24-hour, and 12-hour checkpoints. Include DJ lineup visuals and bottle service promos.

content_gaps.description: Competitors highlighting guest creators, TikTok influencers, and user-generated content. LIV has strong DJ lineup but less visible creator partnership activation.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Tag and repost 5-7 influencer posts from this weekend's events; offer guestlist incentive for high-follower creators.

content_gaps.description: Beach clubs (Encore, LIV Beach) have strong #OOTD content; nightclubs leveraging outfit guides. LIV Nightclub coverage is limited relative to venue capacity.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Curate 3-4 outfit-forward reels showing MDW club looks from recent events.

influencer_activity.mention: EDC Week recap mentioning LIV nightclub discolines performance 4 days ago — strong engagement
John Summit confirmed at LIV Beach Sun 5/24; tagged in multiple user posts from EDC Week
Confirmed at LIV Beach Fri 5/22; has direct mention in @livbeach bio carousel

venues.summary: Strong EDC Week performance with Tiësto, David Guetta, Four Color Zack confirmed; active guestlist promoter presence.

raw_posts.content_summary: EDC Week full lineup posted: Josh Baker B2B Kettama B2B Prospa (Wed), Dom Dolla (Thu), Tiësto (Fri), Four Color Zack (Sat), David Guetta (Mon). High-value talent mix.
EDC Week recap highlighting discolines performance at LIV with user-generated content. 'Vegas is alive this week' messaging.
Guestlist promoter (Edwin Griffiths) actively managing EDC Week events with free entry for females 10PM-1AM, reduced cover for males.
